name: ACC
programsInGuide: Virginia, Wake Forest, SMU, Clemson, Notre Dame, UNC, Duke, NC State, Louisville, Pitt, Stanford, Syracuse, Cal
relevance: Strongest soccer conference in the US. 13 guide schools — the most of any conference. Clemson 2× recent NCAA champions (2021, 2023), nation-leading 4 first-round picks in 2026 draft. Virginia 7× NCAA champions. SMU won 2025 ACC Tournament (first ever). UNC ACC Regular Season champs 2023. Notre Dame 27 MLS picks. Cal and Stanford add West Coast elite access.

name: Big Ten
programsInGuide: UCLA, Indiana, Maryland, Penn State, Michigan, Michigan State, Ohio State, Northwestern, Wisconsin, Rutgers, Oregon, USC, Washington, Illinois
relevance: 14 guide schools — complete Big Ten coverage. Indiana #1 all-time (8 NCAA titles). UCLA #1 West Coast (4 titles). Maryland all-time MLS pipeline leader (49 picks + 7 homegrown under Cirovski). Penn State, Michigan, OSU, Wisconsin all consistently productive. Conference expansion added Oregon, USC, Washington — strongest western D1 depth outside Big West.

name: Big East
programsInGuide: St. John's, Georgetown, Creighton, UConn, Providence, Villanova, Marquette, Butler, Seton Hall, DePaul, Xavier
relevance: 11 guide schools — complete Big East coverage. Georgetown (2019 champion, 42 MLS signings) and St. John's (NYC, Hospital for Special Surgery proximity) are Olivier's top fits. Creighton consistently in NCAA Tournaments. UConn, Providence, Villanova all improving. Strong northeast urban clinical networks across every school.

name: AAC
programsInGuide: FIU, USF, FAU, Charlotte, Tulsa, Memphis, Temple, East Carolina, UAB, Rice, Navy, Army
relevance: 12 guide schools — the most complete AAC coverage in the guide. Florida trio (FIU, USF, FAU) are Olivier's top AAC fits — warm climate, accessible GPA thresholds, strong exercise science programs. Rice (Houston, top-25 nationally 2025) has the strongest academics. Charlotte ranked No.24 nationally in 2025. Navy and Army included as service academy options (unique financial model — full ride, no athletic scholarship cap).

name: Big West
programsInGuide: UCSB, Cal Poly SLO, UC Davis, UC Irvine, UC Riverside, UC San Diego, Long Beach State, CSU Fullerton
relevance: 8 guide schools — complete Big West coverage. UCSB won Big West Regular Season 2025 (Vom Steeg most experienced coach in guide). Manu Duah #1 overall 2025 MLS pick — highest Big West pick ever. UC Irvine won 2025 Big West Tournament. UC Davis won 2024 tournament. UCSD transitioning to full D1. Pac-12/Big West men's soccer partnership announced 2025 elevates the conference profile significantly.

name: MAC
relevance: Top-20 MLS pipeline all-time — 18 picks under the Coppinger era, Emil Jaaskelainen #7 overall 2024. HC Jared Embick contracted through 2035. Explicit Pre-PT degree concentration with Cleveland Clinic network. Cold Ohio winters are the trade-off.

name: WCC
relevance: Denver won 5 consecutive Summit League titles 2021–2025 and reached the 2024 College Cup Final Four. Moved to WCC in 2026 — a significant elevation in conference profile. HC Jamie Franks is one of the most technically precise developers in D1. Excellent city; cold winters the trade-off.

name: WAC
relevance: GCU won the 2025 WAC title and reached the NCAA Sweet 16 (beating UCLA and San Diego). Jamie Davies appointed December 2025. Phoenix — best warm major-city D1 campus outside Florida and California. Kinesiology with Banner Health clinical network.

name: Ivy League
relevance: Princeton surging — 2024+2025 Ivy Tournament doubles. No athletic scholarships — need-based financial aid only. Yale strong academically. GPA and SAT improvement essential for both programs.

name: CAA
programsInGuide: College of Charleston, Hofstra, Stony Brook, Delaware, Elon, William & Mary, Northeastern, Drexel, Monmouth
relevance: 9 guide schools — complete CAA coverage. Hofstra dominant (4 consecutive CAA titles 2022–2025, NYC access via LIRR). Northeastern (Boston, co-op clinical placements). Drexel (Philadelphia, co-op program). William & Mary (Williamsburg). Delaware note: moved to Conference USA July 2025 — confirm current standing. Note: College of Charleston SC is distinct from U of Charleston WV (D2 MEC).

name: ASUN
relevance: Mid-major D1. UCA has the best central midfielder opening of any D1 in this guide — 6 of 9 MFs clear before 2027. Affordable at ~$28k/yr. Warm climate. UAMS clinical network for pre-PT.

name: SSC
relevance: Best D2 conference nationally. PBA ranked #2 nationally 2025. Florida climate matches Sydney. Strong pipeline to USL Championship and international leagues.

name: LSC
relevance: Austin FC connection unique. Austin-based program under HC Brian Young. Possession-based style in D2 LSC.

name: CCAA
relevance: Most affordable LA option. Strong academic environment for PT pathway.

name: MEC
relevance: D2 regional conference. UC Charleston has Australian on current roster (Jack Allan, Cape Schanck VIC). CAMC hospital clinical partnership for pre-PT. Note: distinct from College of Charleston SC (D1 CAA).

name: SAC
scholarships: Up to equivalent of full ride
relevance: Billy Martin is HC (since 2020). NAIA program with generous scholarships. Program founder Brian Harvey (NAIA HOF) played professionally in Australia — historical connection. Warm spring climate.

name: Sun Conference
scholarships: Up to equivalent of full ride
relevance: Health sciences pathway is the priority over pro soccer at Keiser.

name: SCIAC
relevance: Chapman's Pre-PT required course KIN405 is unique value. Academic-first choice.

name: CCCAA/NJCAA
programsInGuide: Santa Monica, Miami Dade, Iowa Western, Northeast CC, Monroe, Indian Hills, Tyler JC, Daytona State
relevance: 8 guide JUCO schools — all 2-year transfer platforms. Indian Hills 2025 NJCAA DI National Champions. Daytona State 2025 NJCAA DI finalists — top-5 D1 transfer feeder, warm Florida beach city. Tyler JC #1 D1 transfer feeder all-time — East Texas warm city. SMC → UCLA proven pipeline. Miami Dade → Barry/FIU. Monroe 3× NJCAA DI champions, NYC metro. 100% roster turnover before 2027 at all schools — clean slate entry for Olivier.

name: NEC
mlsPipeline: Developing — NEC programs feed regional USL/NPSL pipelines
relevance: Mercyhurst University (Erie, PA) — first D1 NEC season 2025–26. HC Austin Solomon rebuilding from D2 PSAC base. Exercise Science B.S. with 500hr clinical. 2 Australians previously on roster.

name: CACC
relevance: Georgian Court University (Lakewood, NJ) — Dino Raso (13 seasons, 2024 CACC Coach of Year). B.S. Exercise Science Wellness & Sports with explicit Pre-PT/OT/PA tracks. Jersey Shore 20 min, NYC 90 min.

name: AMC
mlsPipeline: NAIA level — USL League Two pathway
scholarships: NAIA — athletic aid, no equivalency cap
relevance: ⚠ Columbia College MO — NO Exercise Science degree (Healthcare Management only). New HC Nathan Mason rebuilding. Best value cost (7k/yr) in guide. Mizzou college-town atmosphere. DPT pathway requires extra planning.
